description: ETF Capital Flow Intelligence — daily fetch of ~100 tagged ETFs via Polygon ETF Global Fund Flows ($99/mo subscription). Computes per-ETF z-scores + persistence, category aggregations, and 6 institutional composite signals (defensive_rotation, smart_vs_dumb, risk_on_off, domestic_vs_intl, growth_vs_value, credit_stress). Writes to etf-flows/* prefix.

schedule.name: justhodl-etf-fund-flows-daily
schedule.description: 17:00 ET — daily ETF flow refresh (after Polygon EOD processing window)
